channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Madlanga Commission probes IDAC's lack of basis for Khumalo investigation
item.description: Adv Andrea Johnson, head of the Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (IDAC), testified at the Madlanga Commission that her unit lacked grounds to investigate Lieutenant General Dumisani Khumal...

item.title: Saskatchewan Health Workers' Union Considers Strike Over Staffing and Wage Concerns
item.description: The Saskatchewan Health Care Workers' Union (CUPE Local 5430) has announced plans to vote on potential job action in September 2026 after over three years of negotiations with the Saskatchewan Health ...

item.title: U.S. Treasury Considers Sanctions Against Moonshot Over AI Model Distillation Allegations
item.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has warned Chinese AI firm Moonshot of potential sanctions after the White House accused it of improperly distilling Anthropic’s Fable model. Model distillation, ...

item.title: Government introduces new foreign funding regulations to curb political influence
item.description: The Indian government has introduced new regulations to monitor and control foreign funding in political campaigns, aiming to prevent undue influence from external entities. The policy mandates transp...

item.title: Tanzania boosts domestic healthcare investment to enhance self-reliance
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has urged African nations to prioritize domestic healthcare investment, emphasizing the need for stronger local capacity to build resilient health systems. At the African...

item.title: Senator Cayetano's reliance on credentials to dismiss non-lawyers
item.description: The article critiques Senator Alan Peter Cayetano's habit of using his law degree as a credential to dismiss non-lawyers in political debates. It argues that possessing a law degree does not equate to...

item.title: Trump criticises Mets during Georgia rally amid political tensions and Iran conflict
item.description: Donald Trump returned to Georgia for a rally aimed at bolstering his political base and advancing his agenda. During the event, he mocked the New York Mets, his hometown baseball team, stating they 'l...

item.title: Indigenous cultural values must shape conservation efforts for the Fitzroy River
item.description: The article highlights the critical role of Indigenous cultural values in environmental conservation, focusing on the Fitzroy River (Martuwarra) in Western Australia. For Traditional Custodians, the r...

item.title: Spotify's Rise in Non-English Music Markets: A Global Trend
item.description: Spotify is witnessing a significant surge in non-English music across global markets, driven by genres like K-pop, Afrobeats, and Latin urban music. The company's expansion into regions such as South ...

item.title: Ndejembi halts further contract extensions for Songea-Masasi power line project
item.description: The Tanzanian government has decided to stop extending the contract for the 220kv Songea-Masasi power line project. This decision comes after a review of the contractor's performance and adherence to ...

item.title: Calgary Police Retain Phones of Ex-Mayor Gondek in Corruption Investigation
item.description: A Calgary judge has ordered the phones of former mayor Jyoti Gondek and others to remain with police during a corruption investigation until March 2027. The court rejected lawyers' requests to dismiss...

item.title: Ukrainian Military Leader Appointed to Reform Soviet-Style Command Culture
item.description: Mykhailo Drapatyi, a decorated Ukrainian officer known for his criticism of the military's traditional command structure, has been appointed commander-in-chief of Ukraine's armed forces. This decision...

item.title: News Corp Australia Implements Measures to Manage Crawler Bot Traffic
item.description: The article discusses News Corp Australia's implementation of software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. Users encountering an error message indicating they've been blocked as a crawler b...

item.title: eThekwini Municipality Struggles with 65% Water Loss and 12,000 Leaks
item.description: The eThekwini Municipality is facing a severe water crisis, with Non-Revenue Water (NRW) reaching 65% in July 2026, indicating significant water losses due to leaks. Over 12,000 leaks have been report...

item.title: Impeachment Trial Dispute: Prosecution and Defense Clash Over Panel Neutrality
item.description: Rep. Gerville Luistro, lead prosecutor in Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, defended the prosecution's role in establishing the case against the respondent, stating that neutrality woul...

item.title: DSS Witness Denies Involvement In Facebook Letter Controversy During Sowore Trial
item.description: A key witness from the Department of State Services (DSS) has denied authoring a letter allegedly sent to Meta Platforms, the parent company of Facebook, during the ongoing trial of human rights activ...

item.title: Sophia Loren's Glamour Captured in 1965 Film 'Lady L' Portraits
item.description: These 30 stunning portraits capture Italian actress Sophia Loren at the peak of her career during the filming of the 1965 romantic comedy ‘Lady L,’ directed by Peter Ustinov. The images highlight her ...

item.title: Labor Party's 50th National Conference Focuses on Green Energy and AI Policy
item.description: The Labor Party's 50th National Conference in Adelaide is shaping up to be a pivotal event for Australia's political landscape, with key debates on green energy transitions, artificial intelligence re...

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford Calls for Unified Response to Trump's Tariff Threats

item.title: Tanzania Insight News Update: July 22, 2026
item.description: The article appears to be a placeholder or template for a news piece dated July 22, 2026, published by Tanzania Insight. It includes standard elements like social media icons, share options, and copyr...
